rationale.R1.6: The revision improves clarity and flow, addressing some run-on sentences and tense inconsistencies.
rationale.RX.1: While the summary mentions uncertainty about the model's claims, it doesn't explicitly flag uncertainty for specific recommendations in the revised text.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text covers exactly the same dimensions as described in the original passage.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced in the revision.
rationale.RX.5: The summary mentions prose-level changes but doesn't provide evidence of source tracing for non-cosmetic edits.
